p.code: SELECT city, COUNT(*), AVG(age) FROM users GROUP BY city

g.text: ⑤ After row 3 — NYC,35 merged into bucket
⑥ After row 4 — LA,20 merged into bucket
⑧ After row 6 — NYC,28 merged · All rows consumed
⑨ Finalize each bucket: avg = sum / count
⑩ Output — one row per distinct city
new city → create bucket : count=1, sum=age
seen city → update bucket : count++, sum+=age
finalize → emit result : city, count, sum/count
